metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_894
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors investigated a transgenic mouse line expressing Neurexin 1-alpha with an extracellular HRP tag. Functionality of this transgene was shown by rescue of Neurexin triple KO phenotypes in Zhang et al. J Neurosci. 2005, 25:4330-42. PMID: 15858059

Fig. 4 shows that Neurexin 1-alpha labeling was observed mainly in the ER and at presynaptic terminals. Labeling included the presynaptic plasma membrane but was also present at presynaptic vesicular structures.

22/6/2017 Pim
- The "intergral component of ..." part of the selected term was derived from the transmembrane domain(s) of the protein.. Experimental description: transgenic mouse line expressing Neurexin 1-alpha with an internal horseradish peroxidase (HRP) epitope tag
